title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A step-by-step tutorial on setting up and running Claude Code locally for free using Ollama and building a complete agentic travel AI application. The guide covers installation on Windows, LLM selection like Qwen 3.5, and deploying a Flask-based full-stack AI app with multiple agents.
